verdict: A highly monotonous, flat-density chart that maps every single eighth-note beat with zero rhythmic variety or musical structure.

issues.problem: Completely flat density with an unrelenting eighth-note stream. There is absolutely no pacing contrast between the calm intro/outro and the energetic drop sections.
Extreme lack of rhythmic variety; the omission of syncopations, quarter notes, or natural rests makes the gameplay feel repetitive and auto-generated.
A cramped and unintuitive multi-lane hold overlap (2-beat hold on GAP overlapping with a 1-beat hold on NOTE while requiring a BAR tap) that doesn't fit the casual-first design.
Lane assignments feel randomized and fail to establish any clear musical mapping, such as anchoring kick drums to the center lane or snares to the outer lanes.
